name: laravel-ai-foundation
description: Laravel architecture guidance from the Programming Foundation knowledge base.

interface.shortDescription: Use Laravel architecture guidance from Context7.
interface.longDescription: Adds a skill that steers agents toward the Programming Foundation topic guides before designing Laravel actions, DDD boundaries, request validation, testing strategy, or overengineering-sensitive architecture.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Laravel AI Foundation to design this Laravel feature without overengineering it.
